title: Skill Audit Loop Manifest
description: Binding shape for skill-graph/audits/manifest.json — the machine-readable index of Skill Audit Loop protocols, runners, required per-skill run artifacts, and runtime aliases. Authored as part of the 2026-05-25 multi-model restructure review (closes Opus novelty memo #1 — the manifest's schema_version: 1 label had no content bar). Reader: skill-graph/scripts/check-audit-manifest.js. Provenance: ADR-0015 introduced the manifest; ADR-0016 sequences its evolution.

schema_version.description: Audits-manifest contract version. v1 introduced by ADR-0015. Bumps when shape changes break check-audit-manifest.js consumers.

description.description: Human-readable purpose of this file. Must name the verifier that reads it and the governing ADR.

protocols.description: One entry per protocol governed by this manifest. The Skill Audit Loop is the current sole protocol; the array shape supports future additions (e.g., a Skill Routing protocol manifest).

id.description: Stable identifier (kebab-case). Used as a verifier-flag selector when multiple protocols live in this manifest.

version.description: Protocol contract version (e.g., 'v3+'). Distinct from this manifest's schema_version.

canonical_path.description: Path to the protocol's binding contract document. MUST live inside skill-graph/ per ADR-0015 (project-owned operational prompts).

runners.description: Operational runner prompts that execute the canonical contract. Each runner has a distinct mode (interactive-single-skill, autonomous-batch-*, etc.).

required_artifacts_per_skill.description: Per-skill run artifacts the verifier enforces. Each entry has a name, required flag, and an optional `when` clause.

aliases.description: Workspace runtime → project canonical mappings. Used by slash-command resolvers (.claude/commands/, .opencode/commands/) and back-compat stubs (prompts/audits/).

mode.description: Execution mode the runner is shaped for. Mode names are stable; new modes require a manifest schema bump and a new enum value.

version.description: Runner contract version. Accepts shapes like 'v3', 'v3+', 'v4', 'v5', '1.0' (audit M8, 2026-05-27 — was free-form, allowed silent typos).

name.description: Filename of the per-skill run artifact (audit M15, 2026-05-27). Restricted to filename-safe characters so a typo like 'findings .md' (stray space) fails schema validation rather than silently never matching on disk.

when.description: Predicate over skill state (e.g., "skill.comprehension_verdict in ['PROVISIONAL','PASS','SHALLOW','REDUNDANT']") OR runner state (e.g., "runner.mode startswith 'autonomous-batch-'"). The schema pattern constrains the four supported shapes — `always`, `skill.<field> in [<list>]`, `skill.<field> == '<value>'`, or `runner.(id|mode) (==|startswith) '<value>'` (audit M15, 2026-05-27). Predicate values MUST come from the corresponding enum in skill-graph/schemas/skill-audit-state.schema.json (e.g., the comprehension_verdict enum).

path.description: Workspace-relative path template (e.g., 'skills/<name>/evals/comprehension.json'). The `<name>` placeholder is the skill's directory name under skills/.

from.description: Workspace runtime location (e.g., '.claude/commands/audit/audit.md', 'prompts/audits/skill-audit-loop-single-model.md'). Anything that is NOT under skill-graph/.

to.description: Project canonical the runtime location resolves to. MUST live inside skill-graph/.
